cases.question: What movies would you recommend to User 1 based on what similar users enjoyed? Suggest films that User 1 hasn't seen yet but were highly rated by people with overlapping tastes. Show the top 10.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (u1:User {userId: '1'})-[:RATED]->(common:Movie)<-[:RATED]-(similar:User)
WHERE similar <> u1
WITH u1, similar, count(common) AS overlap
WHERE overlap >= 2
MATCH (similar)-[r:RATED]->(rec:Movie)
WHERE r.rating >= 4.0
  AND NOT EXISTS { (u1)-[:RATED]->(rec) }
WITH rec, count(DISTINCT similar) AS recommenderCount, avg(r.rating) AS avgRating
ORDER BY recommenderCount DESC, avgRating DESC
RETURN rec.title        AS title,
       recommenderCount  AS recommendedBy,
       round(avgRating * 100) / 100 AS avgRating
LIMIT 10

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

WITH g,

RETURN g.name AS genre, topMovies
ORDER BY g.name

cases.question: What are the top 5 movies I should recommend to User 534? Base it on what users with similar viewing histories rated highly, excluding anything User 534 has already seen.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (u:User {userId: '534'})-[:RATED]->(seen:Movie)
WITH u, collect(seen) AS seenMovies

MATCH (u)-[:RATED]->(common:Movie)<-[:RATED]-(similar:User)
WHERE similar <> u

MATCH (similar)-[r:RATED]->(rec:Movie)
WHERE NOT rec IN seenMovies
  AND r.rating >= 4.0

WITH rec,
     count(DISTINCT similar) AS similarUserCount,
     avg(r.rating)            AS avgRating
ORDER BY similarUserCount DESC, avgRating DESC
LIMIT 5

RETURN rec.title        AS title,
       rec.imdbRating   AS imdbRating,
       similarUserCount,
       round(avgRating, 2) AS avgRating

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

RETURN p.name AS person, actedInCount, directedCount

cases.question: What is the shortest connection between Tom Hanks and Kevin Bacon through shared movie appearances? List the films on the path.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (tom:Person {name: 'Tom Hanks'}), (kevin:Person {name: 'Kevin Bacon'})
MATCH p = SHORTEST 1 (tom)(()-[:ACTED_IN]-(:Movie)-[:ACTED_IN]-()){1,}(kevin)
RETURN [node IN nodes(p) WHERE node:Movie | node.title] AS films,
       [node IN nodes(p) WHERE node:Person | node.name]  AS people,
       length(p) / 2                                      AS degrees_of_separation

cases.question: What are the top 10 movies to recommend to User 1, factoring in both what similar users enjoyed and whether the movie's genres match their viewing history? Weight peer ratings more heavily than genre overlap.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (u:User {userId: '1'})

CALL (u) {
  MATCH (u)-[:RATED]->(m:Movie)
  RETURN collect(elementId(m)) AS watchedIds
}
CALL (u) {
  MATCH (u)-[:RATED]->(m:Movie)-[:IN_GENRE]->(g:Genre)
  RETURN collect(DISTINCT g.name) AS userGenres
}

MATCH (u)-[:RATED]->(shared:Movie)<-[:RATED]-(peer:User)-[rec:RATED]->(candidate:Movie)
WHERE peer <> u
  AND NOT elementId(candidate) IN watchedIds
  AND rec.rating >= 3.5

WITH candidate, userGenres,
     avg(rec.rating)      AS avgPeerRating,
     count(DISTINCT peer) AS peerCount

MATCH (candidate)-[:IN_GENRE]->(cg:Genre)
WITH candidate, userGenres, avgPeerRating, peerCount,
     collect(cg.name) AS candidateGenres,
     count(CASE WHEN cg.name IN userGenres THEN 1 ELSE null END) AS matchingGenreCount

WITH candidate, avgPeerRating, peerCount, matchingGenreCount,
     toFloat(matchingGenreCount) /
       CASE WHEN size(candidateGenres) > 0 THEN size(candidateGenres) ELSE 1 END AS genreOverlapRatio
WITH candidate, avgPeerRating, peerCount, matchingGenreCount, genreOverlapRatio,
     round((0.7 * (avgPeerRating / 5.0) + 0.3 * genreOverlapRatio) * 1000) / 1000 AS score

RETURN candidate.title                       AS title,
       candidate.imdbRating                  AS imdbRating,
       round(avgPeerRating * 100) / 100      AS avgPeerRating,
       peerCount                             AS supportingPeers,
       matchingGenreCount                    AS matchingGenres,
       round(genreOverlapRatio * 100) / 100  AS genreOverlapRatio,
       score                                 AS recommendationScore
ORDER BY score DESC
LIMIT 10

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Which users have the broadest influence in our community — meaning the most other users who share similar taste in movies? Show the top 10 most well-connected users.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (u:User)-[r1:RATED]->(m:Movie)<-[r2:RATED]-(other:User)
WHERE u <> other
  AND abs(r1.rating - r2.rating) <= 1.0
WITH u, count(DISTINCT other) AS tasteNeighbors
RETURN u.userId, u.name, tasteNeighbors
ORDER BY tasteNeighbors DESC
LIMIT 10

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Which movies were genuine box office hits — films where the revenue clearly outpaced the production budget? Show the top 15.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (m:Movie)
WHERE m.budget IS NOT NULL AND m.budget > 0
  AND m.revenue IS NOT NULL AND m.revenue > 0
  AND m.revenue > m.budget
WITH m,
     m.revenue - m.budget           AS profit,
     toFloat(m.revenue) / m.budget  AS returnMultiple
RETURN m.title                              AS title,
       m.budget                             AS budget,
       m.revenue                            AS revenue,
       profit,
       round(returnMultiple * 10) / 10.0    AS returnMultiple
ORDER BY returnMultiple DESC
LIMIT 15

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected
